# chart

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/chart"
```

Package chart provides natal and event chart calculations including planet positions, house cusps, angles, and aspect detection.

Use CalcSingleChart for natal/event charts and CalcDoubleChart for synastry/transit overlays with cross\-aspects. Helper functions such as CalcPlanetLongitude and CalcNatalFixedHouses support lower\-level queries.

<details><summary>Example</summary>
<p>



```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/chart"
	"github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/models"
	"github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/sweph"
)

func init() {
	ephePath, _ := filepath.Abs("../../third_party/swisseph/ephe")
	sweph.Init(ephePath)
}

func main() {
	planets := []models.PlanetID{
		models.PlanetSun, models.PlanetMoon, models.PlanetMercury,
		models.PlanetVenus, models.PlanetMars,
	}

	info, err := chart.CalcSingleChart(
		51.5074, -0.1278, 2451545.0, // London, J2000.0
		planets, models.DefaultOrbConfig(), models.HousePlacidus,
	)
	if err != nil {
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, err)
		return
	}

	for _, p := range info.Planets {
		fmt.Printf("%s: %s %s\n", p.PlanetID, p.Sign, models.FormatLonDMS(p.Longitude))
	}
	// Output is dynamic based on ephemeris
}
```

</p>
</details>

```go
func CalcDoubleChart(innerLat, innerLon, innerJD float64, innerPlanets []models.PlanetID, outerLat, outerLon, outerJD float64, outerPlanets []models.PlanetID, specialPoints *models.SpecialPointsConfig, orbs models.OrbConfig, hsys models.HouseSystem) (*models.ChartInfo, *models.ChartInfo, []models.CrossAspectInfo, error)
```

```go
func FindHouseForLongitude(lon float64, cusps []float64) int
```

<a name="IsDayChart"></a>
## func [IsDayChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/chart/chart.go#L273>)

```go
func IsDayChart(jdUT, asc float64) bool
```

IsDayChart checks if Sun is above the horizon at the given time. Uses the Sun's longitude relative to the ASC\-DSC axis.
